form.formComment: Narrowly beaten last time at Manawatu when only a head from the winner but did record an excellent 21.12 over the 375m journey. Looks ready to win.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Narrowly beaten last time at Manawatu when only a head from the winner but did record an excellent 21.12 over the 375m journey. Looks ready to win.

form.formComment: Found some support last start but struggled and finished last on March 26 over 295m at Addington behind Opawa Elvis beaten 15 lengths (17.91) in a Class 3. Placed two back at this track. One of the main chances.

form.formComment: In the money last time at Cambridge Raceway (21.70) in a Class 3, finishing a 6 length third. Has two wins and three placings from seven starts from the draw. Leading chance.

form.formComment: At the last outing finished 4th over 390m at this track beaten 8 lengths (23.34) behind Big Divot in a Class 3 on March 31. Top-three hope with the right run.

form.formComment: Finished seventh (17.88) last start at Addington. Prior to that had recorded three minor placings in a row. Needs to lift.

form.formComment: Hasn't threatened at his last couple but he does have a good record at the track and trip, including two wins. Comes out of a hot form race. Should bounce back.

form.formComment: Last start finished fifth over 390m at this track, beaten 14 lengths (23.68) behind Homebush Rosa in a Class 3 on March 18. Shouldn't trouble the top few hopes.
